title: Welcome to Glitch Studio — Episode 0
directorNotes: Cold open with Sam introducing the new studio, brand sting, then Jack's reaction and Glitch's first ominous appearance. Short — under 90 seconds.

renderLines.text: Welcome back to the show. Today is special. We just built a brand new studio.
Wait, we built a what? A whole studio? Did I sleep through that meeting?
You did sleep through that meeting. We built Glitch Studio Builder so we can make episodes like this one without ever leaving the desk.
So you cloned my voice. You cloned your voice. Did you clone anyone else?
You don't have to look at me. You'll feel it soon enough. There's no need to hurry.
Nope. No. No. I am leaving.

script:
[SAM | Calm] Welcome back to the show. Today is special. We just built a brand new studio.
[Jack | Playful] Wait, we built a what? A whole studio? Did I sleep through that meeting?
[SAM | Calm] You did sleep through that meeting. We built Glitch Studio Builder so we can make episodes like this one without ever leaving the desk.
[Jack | Confused] So you cloned my voice. You cloned your voice. Did you clone anyone else?
[SAM | Calm] Just one more. Say hello.
[SFX: transition swell]
[Glitch_Voice | Sinister] You don't have to look at me. You'll feel it soon enough. There's no need to hurry.
[Jack | Fearful] Nope. No. No. I am leaving.
[SAM | Calm] Welcome to the cast.
